content.text: Add a shared Event type across the monorepo. Put shared types in packages/core, wire event handler endpoints in packages/server, and add an EventList UI component in packages/ui.
I will implement this in three passes: core types and validators, server event storage + handlers + routes, then UI event components and exports. I will run typecheck, tests, and build at the end.

content.text: I will define `AppEvent` with stable fields for API and UI, plus an `EventFilter` interface for server query and UI filtering. Then I will add reusable validators in core.

content.text: Implemented shared event support across all three packages. In `packages/core`, I added `AppEvent` and `EventFilter` to `types.ts`, created `validators.ts` with `validateEvent` and `matchesFilter`, and exported validators from `index.ts`. In `packages/server`, I added in-memory event data access in `db/events.ts`, new list/create handlers in `handlers/events.ts`, request validation middleware in `middleware/validate.ts`, and wired `/events` GET/POST routes plus JSON parsing in `index.ts`. In `packages/ui`, I added `EventCard` and `EventList` components using `AppEvent` from `@monorepo/core` and existing `useQuery`, then exported them from `ui/index.ts`. Validation checks passed: typecheck, tests (13 total), and build all succeeded for core/server/ui.
